title: Guided Daanio onboarding and model inheritance
highlights: Choose secure Daanio browser login or manual first-party API-key login during onboarding
Select from the authenticated account's live Daanio model catalog immediately after login
Agents inherit the currently selected main model unless the user explicitly chooses another model
improvements: Adds browser and API-key login method flags for scripted or repeatable account setup
Improves onboarding prompts, colors, validation messages, and recovery after a failed login
Keeps production models API-driven with no hardcoded model catalog or image models
fixes: Switching models now interrupts the active turn so subsequent agent work uses the newly selected model
Manual keys are validated against the Daanio account API before they are saved
Public macOS, Linux, and Windows installers remain available from clean repository checkouts
